subcodes.first_line: O Concourse of the horizons! The Day of the Covenant hath come, and He Who was hidden in primal eternity hath appeared. Verily, He hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الافاق قد اتی یوم المیثاق و ظهر من کان مکنونا فی ازل الازال انه اتی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action
